title: Write view component for displaying file content and tool output
purpose: Renders a UI component that displays file path, content preview, and tool execution output for write operations.

steps.content: Extract input properties from the tool call item.
Parse file path and content from the input, defaulting to empty strings.
Split content into lines and calculate line and character counts.
Generate a preview of the content by taking the first 30 lines.
Determine if the content was truncated and calculate remaining lines.
Extract status and tool use ID from the raw item data.
Render the file path if present.
Display line and character count statistics.
Show a preview of the content in a scrollable preformatted block.
Render the output panel with tool execution details.
